'''Mas Missur''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Mas Missur achieved the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the end of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] that plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Missur took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] in the newly created [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], leading [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] on several fronts.<ref name="RCTC" />

When the Republic incited a [[Battle of Gaftikar|rebellion]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gaftikar]], Master Missur was assigned to lead the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] ''[[Leveler]]'' to the world to provide support against a CIS invasion. Assisting the [[Marit]] population, Missur and the [[35th Infantry]] were successful in securing the planet's mineral wealth for the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{1stm}}
